description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-list` (T2-03) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, list type (ordered/unordered/description) typed, item slot typing
2. Accessibility — proper `<ul>/<ol>/<dl>` semantics or ARIA equivalents, nested list support, axe-core pass
3. Tests — ordered/unordered/description lists, nested lists, custom markers, interactive items, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all list types and nesting demos
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, custom markers/bullets, spacing, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-list — T2-03 antagonistic quality review
